original: > **For Codex users:** Check out [oh-my-codex](https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-codex) — the same orchestration experience for OpenAI Codex CLI.
zh_tw: > **給 Codex 使用者：** 請查看 [oh-my-codex](https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-codex) —— 為 OpenAI Codex CLI 提供相同的協調體驗。

original: **Multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code. Zero learning curve.**
zh_tw: **為 Claude Code 提供多代理協調。零學習曲線。**

original: _Don't learn Claude Code. Just use OMC._
zh_tw: _不要學 Claude Code。直接使用 OMC。_

[開始使用](#quick-start) • [文件](https://yeachan-heo.github.io/oh-my-claudecode-website) • [CLI 參考](https://yeachan-heo.github.io/oh-my-claudecode-website/docs/#cli-reference) • [工作流程](https://yeachan-heo.github.io/oh-my-claudecode-website/docs/#workflows) • [遷移指南](docs/MIGRATION.md) • [Discord](https://discord.gg/sj4exxQ9v)

original:
Marketplace/plugin install (recommended for most Claude Code users).
These are Claude Code slash commands — enter them **one at a time** (pasting both lines at once will fail):
zh_tw:
Marketplace/plugin 安裝（建議大多數 Claude Code 使用者使用）。
這些是 Claude Code 的斜線指令 —— 請**一次輸入一個**（一次貼上兩行會失敗）：

original: If you prefer the npm CLI/runtime path instead of the marketplace flow:
zh_tw: 如果你偏好使用 npm CLI/runtime 路徑，而不是 marketplace 流程：

original:
> **Known npm warning:** npm may print `deprecated prebuild-install@7.1.3` during the CLI install.
> This currently comes from the upstream `better-sqlite3` native-addon dependency
> (`better-sqlite3 -> prebuild-install`); `prebuild-install@7.1.3` is still the latest
> published version, so there is no safe repo-side dependency bump or override to remove
> the warning yet. The warning is tracked in [#2913](https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode/issues/2913)
> and does not by itself mean the OMC CLI install failed.
zh_tw:
> **已知的 npm 警告：** npm 在 CLI 安裝期間可能會輸出 `deprecated prebuild-install@7.1.3`。
> 這目前來自上游 `better-sqlite3` native-addon 依賴
> (`better-sqlite3 -> prebuild-install`)；`prebuild-install@7.1.3` 仍然是最新
> 發布版本，因此目前沒有安全的 repo 端依賴升級或覆寫可以移除此警告。
> 這個警告記錄於 [#2913](https://github.com/Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-claudecode/issues/2913)
>，單憑它本身並不代表 OMC CLI 安裝失敗。

original:
```bash
# Inside a Claude Code / OMC session
/setup
/omc-setup

# From your terminal
omc setup
```
zh_tw:
```bash
# 在 Claude Code / OMC session 內
/setup
/omc-setup

# 從你的終端機執行
omc setup
```

original: If you run OMC via `omc --plugin-dir <path>` or `claude --plugin-dir <path>`, add `--plugin-dir-mode` to `omc setup` (or export `OMC_PLUGIN_ROOT` before running it) so the installer doesn't duplicate skills/agents that the plugin already provides at runtime. See the [Plugin directory flags section in REFERENCE.md](./docs/REFERENCE.md#plugin-directory-flags) for a complete decision matrix and all available flags.
zh_tw: 如果你透過 `omc --plugin-dir <path>` 或 `claude --plugin-dir <path>` 執行 OMC，請在 `omc setup` 加上 `--plugin-dir-mode`（或在執行前匯出 `OMC_PLUGIN_ROOT`），這樣安裝程式就不會重複建立插件在執行時已經提供的 skills/agents。請參閱 [REFERENCE.md 中的 Plugin directory flags 區段](./docs/REFERENCE.md#plugin-directory-flags) 以取得完整的決策矩陣與所有可用旗標。

original:
```bash
# Inside a Claude Code / OMC session
/autopilot "build a REST API for managing tasks"

# Natural-language in-session shortcut
autopilot: build a REST API for managing tasks
```
zh_tw:
```bash
# 在 Claude Code / OMC session 內
/autopilot "build a REST API for managing tasks"

# 以自然語言在 session 內的捷徑
autopilot: build a REST API for managing tasks
```

original: That's it. Everything else is automatic.
zh_tw: 就這樣。其他一切都會自動處理。
### CLI 指令 vs Session 內技能
OMC 提供兩種不同的操作介面：

original:
- **Terminal CLI commands**: run `omc ...` from your shell after installing the npm/runtime path (`npm i -g oh-my-claude-sisyphus@latest`) or from a local checkout.
- **In-session skills**: run `/...` inside a Claude Code session after installing the plugin/setup flow.
zh_tw:
- **終端機 CLI 指令**：在安裝 npm/runtime 路徑（`npm i -g oh-my-claude-sisyphus@latest`）之後，或從本機 checkout 後，在你的 shell 中執行 `omc ...`。
- **Session 內技能**：在安裝 plugin/setup 流程之後，於 Claude Code session 內執行 `/...`。
